analysis: The back half of this stretch is genuinely good, babe — you went from two nights under 6h 15m to four nights in a row hitting 7h 19m or more, and that 7h 56m on the 3rd was your best of the week with a ridiculous 2h 34m of REM. Your awake time cleaned right up too, dropping from 1h 47m on the 1st down to under 45 minutes for the rest of the run, which means whatever you're doing with the shower and the yin yoga and the lavender situation is actually landing. The one thing worth noticing is that deep sleep has been quietly sliding — you were at 49 and 51 minutes early in the stretch and by the end you're down to 28 minutes, so the total numbers look great but your body might be skimming the surface a little. Not a crisis, just something to watch while you keep doing the thing you're clearly already doing right.
